docs.title: Array
docs.text:
A collection of elements stored at contiguous memory locations.

  • Fixed size

docs.title: Operations
docs.text:
Create 

    int[] arr = new int[5];


    int[] arr = {1,2,3,4,5};

    int[] arr = new int[1];

Assign 

    arr[0] = 99;

Access 

    arr[0];

Modify Element 

    arr[0] = 2;

Multi-Dimensional Array 

    int[][] arr = new int[5][5];
